text: The clippy errors are all pre-existing in the rest of the codebase, not in my files. Let me verify by checking only the clippy output for my specific files.

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input: {"command": "cd /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust && cargo clippy --example session_diff --test session_diff_test -- -D warnings 2>&1 | grep -E \"(session_diff|session_diff_test)\" | head -20", "description": "Check clippy output for only my files"}
